title: Disable Structures
description: This mod allows you to disable any vanilla structure by defining it in the config
body:
What this mod does: Very simple it allows you to disable certain vanilla structures from generating in the world.

Features: Config definable ability to disable any vanilla structure.

 

This mod is able to be used as a server side only mod or client side only. If Joining a server with it installed on only the client though it will do nothing. The side the is generating the world will need to have it installed.

 

Modpack Usage: Feel free to use it in any modpack
